data.author: cottsay
data.message:
Don't try to build on BSD (#126)

The 'BSD' variable was added in CMake 3.25. Note that variables which
are not defined will evaluate to 'False', so this shouldn't regress
platforms using CMake versions older than 3.25.

Signed-off-by: Scott K Logan <logans@cottsay.net>

data.author: r7vme
data.message:
Make dynamic prefault memory size configurable (#89)

* Add -d to set max dynamic memory prefaulting size.
  In old version it did preallocation till prefaulter vector
  reached the size of char array. Then vector reallocated
  (2x) in new memory and leaves old memory free, which
  causes char array to be put into this memory and
  does not cause page fault. In new implementation,
  vector already preallocated with requred size,
  which will prevent vector reallocations.

Signed-off-by: Roman Sokolkov <roman@ree.technology>

data.author: nuclearsandwich
data.message:
Bump version for package consistency within repo. (#54)

Bloom complains that this package and rttest which share the repository must have the same version in package.xml.
https://github.com/ros2/realtime_support/blob/ca3c8eb993245c4ad3b368e1158c630e405ab5e3/rttest/package.xml#L5

data.author: jserv
data.message:
Drop obsolete RTLinux (#68)

RTLinux is obsolete, and both commercial and GPL editions were no longer
maintained. Through the use of the real-time Linux kernel patch
PREEMPT_RT, support for full preemption of critical sections, interrupt
handlers, and "interrupt disable" code sequences can be supported.

data.author: b3em
data.message:
fix test_tlsf__rmw_opensplice_cpp (#59)

test_tlsf__rmw_opensplice_cpp fails with OpenSplice on AArch64 (http://ci.ros2.org/job/ci_linux-aarch64/974/)
I found that it fails because the [check_stacktrace](https://github.com/ros2/realtime_support/blob/master/tlsf_cpp/test/test_tlsf.cpp#L97) function returns fail.
The [tokens](https://github.com/ros2/realtime_support/blob/master/tlsf_cpp/test/test_tlsf.cpp#L43) list used by this function included fastrtps but not opensplice.
